scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @bolt-everything/contracts typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @bolt-everything/workspace-contract typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @bolt-everything/api typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @bolt-everything/contracts test && corepack pnpm --filter @bolt-everything/workspace-contract test && corepack pnpm --filter @bolt-everything/api test
